name: Orla Mining Ltd.
description: Orla Mining Ltd. is a gold producer and explorer focused on developing and operating high-margin precious metals projects in the Americas. The company's flagship asset is the Camino Rojo Oxide Gold Mine in Zacatecas, Mexico, which achieved commercial production in early 2022. Orla also owns the South Railroad Project in Nevada, USA, and the Cerro Quema Project in Panama. With a strong focus on low-cost production and disciplined capital allocation, Orla aims to deliver significant value to shareholders through organic growth and strategic acquisitions in stable mining jurisdictions.
